extract: Aipom Hill (Japanese: エイパム山 Eipam Mountain) is an area located in the western region of the Cobalt Coastlands of Hisui. It is located south of both the Crossing Slope and Ginkgo Landing, and to the west of both Bathers' Lagoon and Hideaway Bay. The warden Iscan of the Diamond Clan, who cares for a special Basculegion, lives in this area. As the name suggests, it is one of the few places in Hisui where Aipom are native.
